runes.name: Health Scaling
runes.description: Grants health based on level.

runes.name: Adaptive Force
runes.description: Grants bonus adaptive force.

runes.name: Adaptive Force
runes.description: Grants bonus adaptive force.

runes.name: Conqueror
runes.description: Gain stacks of adaptive force when attacking enemy champions. After reaching 12 stacks, heal for a portion of damage you deal to champions.

runes.name: Triumph
runes.description: <lol-uikit-tooltipped-keyword key='LinkTooltip_Description_Takedown'>Takedowns</lol-uikit-tooltipped-keyword> restore 5% of your missing health and grant an additional 20 gold.

runes.name: Legend: Haste
runes.description: Takedowns on enemies grant permanent Basic Ability Haste.

runes.name: Last Stand
runes.description: Deal more damage to champions while you are low on health.

runes.name: Conditioning
runes.description: After 12 min gain +8 Armor and +8 Magic Resist and increase your Armor and Magic Resist by 3%.

runes.name: Overgrowth
runes.description: Gain permanent max health when minions or monsters die near you.

runes.description: Takedowns on enemies grant permanent Attack Speed.

runes.name: Cut Down
runes.description: Deal more damage to high health enemy champions.

runes.name: Sudden Impact
runes.description: Damaging basic attacks and abilities deal bonus true damage to enemy champions after using a dash, leap, blink, teleport, or when leaving stealth.

runes.name: Ultimate Hunter
runes.description: Unique takedowns grant permanent cooldown reduction on your Ultimate.

runes.name: Lethal Tempo
runes.description: Attacking an enemy champion grants you Attack Speed, up to 6 stacks. At max stacks, deal <lol-uikit-tooltipped-keyword key='LinkTooltip_Description_AdaptiveDmg'><font color='#48C4B7'>bonus adaptive damage</font></lol-uikit-tooltipped-keyword> On-Attack.

runes.name: Bone Plating
runes.description:
After taking damage from an enemy champion, the next 3 spells or attacks you receive from them deal 30-60 (based on level) less damage.

Duration: 1.5s
Cooldown: 55s

runes.name: Health Scaling
runes.description: Grants health based on level.

runes.name: Adaptive Force
runes.description: Grants bonus adaptive force.

runes.name: Attack Speed
runes.description: Grants bonus attack speed.

runes.name: Electrocute
runes.description: Hitting a champion with 3 separate attacks or abilities in 3s deals bonus adaptive damage.

runes.name: Taste of Blood
runes.description: Heal when you damage an enemy champion.

runes.name: Grisly Mementos
runes.description:
Collect 1 memento on champion takedowns, up to 18 total.

Gain 6 Trinket Haste for each collected.

runes.name: Treasure Hunter
runes.description: Unique takedowns grant additional gold the first time they are collected.

runes.name: Manaflow Band
runes.description:
Hitting an enemy champion with an ability permanently increases your maximum mana by 25, up to 250 mana.

After reaching 250 bonus mana, restore 1% of your missing mana every 5 seconds.

runes.name: Transcendence
runes.description:
Gain bonuses upon reaching the following levels:
Level 5: +5 Ability Haste
Level 8: +5 Ability Haste
Level 11: On Champion takedown, reduce the remaining cooldown of basic abilities by 20%.

runes.name: Aftershock
runes.description: After <lol-uikit-tooltipped-keyword key='LinkTooltip_Description_Immobilize'>immobilizing</lol-uikit-tooltipped-keyword> an enemy champion gain defenses and later deal a burst of magic damage around you.

runes.name: Shield Bash
runes.description: Whenever you gain a shield, your next basic attack against a champion deals bonus <lol-uikit-tooltipped-keyword key='LinkTooltip_Description_Adaptive'><font color='#48C4B7'>adaptive</font></lol-uikit-tooltipped-keyword> damage.

runes.name: Unflinching
runes.description: Gain Armor and Magic Resist when receiving crowd control.

runes.name: Hextech Flashtraption
runes.description:
While Flash is on cooldown it is replaced by Hexflash.

Hexflash: Channel, then blink to a new location.

runes.name: Cosmic Insight
runes.description:
+18 Summoner Spell Haste
+10 Item Haste

runes.description: Takedowns on enemies grant permanent Life Steal, up to a cap. Once the cap is reached, increase your max health. Weaker earlier but stronger later game than other Legend Runes.

runes.description: Deal more damage to low health enemy champions.

runes.name: Absolute Focus
runes.description: While above 70% health, gain extra <lol-uikit-tooltipped-keyword key='LinkTooltip_Description_AdaptiveDmg'>adaptive damage</lol-uikit-tooltipped-keyword>.

runes.name: Gathering Storm
runes.description: Gain increasing amounts of AD or AP, <lol-uikit-tooltipped-keyword key='LinkTooltip_Description_Adaptive'>adaptive</lol-uikit-tooltipped-keyword> over the course of the game.

runes.name: Dark Harvest
runes.description: Damaging a low health champion inflicts <lol-uikit-tooltipped-keyword key='LinkTooltip_Description_AdaptiveDmg'>adaptive damage</lol-uikit-tooltipped-keyword> and harvests a soul from the victim.

runes.name: Cheap Shot
runes.description: Deal bonus true damage to enemy champions with <lol-uikit-tooltipped-keyword key='LinkTooltip_Description_ImpairAct'>impaired movement or actions</lol-uikit-tooltipped-keyword>.

runes.name: Sixth Sense
runes.description:
On a long Cooldown, automatically sense a nearby untracked and unseen ward, tracking it for the team.

Level 11: Also reveal the ward for 10s.
